description: Conservative generic mediator family starter entries for Extension 2 exploratory mode. All specific energy and density values are conservative generic estimates for trade space exploration only. Do not treat as measured or flight-qualified material properties.

entries.label: PCM Eutectic Store (Generic)
notes: Represents a high-temperature eutectic PCM class (e.g. fluoride salt eutectics or metal alloy eutectics). Specific energy 200 kJ/kg is conservative for this temperature range; some fluoride eutectics exceed 500 kJ/kg latent heat.

Contamination and corrosion sensitivity is high because eutectic salts are corrosive to most structural metals at temperature. Compatible container materials (refractory metals, coated graphite) add mass and complexity.

Cycling risk is moderate: thermal cycling can cause volume change, phase segregation, or container fatigue. These risks must be addressed in detailed design. Not suitable for uncontrolled use without materials engineering review.

entries.label: Sensible Refractory Store (Generic)
notes: Represents dense refractory ceramics (alumina, magnesia, silicon carbide composites) used as sensible heat stores. Specific energy 900 J/(kg·K) is representative of SiC class ceramics for sensible storage; actual value is temperature-averaged Cp over the operating range.

Sensible storage is lower energy density than PCM at similar mass but offers better thermal and mechanical stability, simpler containment, and lower cycling risk. Heritage in high-temperature industrial regenerators.

entries.label: Liquid Metal Exchange Candidate (Generic)
notes: Represents liquid metal heat transfer candidates (e.g. NaK, lead-bismuth eutectic, or alkali metals). Specific heat capacity 180 J/(kg·K) is representative of NaK-78 class. High density (7500 kg/m³) means mass-efficiency for storage is lower than ceramics or PCMs per volume, but thermal conductivity is very high.

Corrosion sensitivity is high: alkali metals and lead-bismuth attack most standard structural alloys. Specialized refractory metal or coated container required. Heritage exists in nuclear and concentrated solar applications but not in space thermal management at these scales.
